top.title: Allies of US in the Gulf bear brunt of Iran attacks
top.summary: Iran's attacks on Gulf Arab states suggest the Islamic Republic is targeting not just the US military but also civilian infrastructure.

top.title: Oil prices rise after ships attacked near Strait of Hormuz
top.summary: Experts have warned that a prolonged conflict could push global energy prices even higher.

top.title: Kidnapping of foreigners soars in Africa's lawless Sahel region
top.summary: Growing insecurity in the Sahel made 2025 one of the worst years on record for the abduction of foreigners in Africa.

top.title: Consultation on social media ban for under-16s to begin
top.summary: Discussions over what measures to implement to protect children's wellbeing will last for three months.

top.title: Trump orders government to stop using Anthropic in battle over AI use
top.summary: The move announced on social media comes after a standoff between Anthropic's boss and the US Department of Defense.

top.title: Resident Evil Requiem's director on redefining the survival horror genre
top.summary: Director Koshi Nakanishi says balancing action and horror within the game has been a huge challenge.

title.#text: Qualcomm’s new chip is geared toward wearable AI gadgets

A robot arm with puppy dog eyes is just one of Lenovo’s new desktop AI concepts
